zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Herbert於1428年出生在威爾士蒙姆爾武斯可時，她的父親Sir William ap Thomas Herbert KG27歲，母親Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam44歲。她於1444年與Sir William Adams Sr在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾武斯可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1460年在英國威爾斯布洛可爾享年33歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Herbert于1428年出生在威尔士蒙姆爾武斯可时，她的父亲Sir William ap Thomas Herbert KG27岁，母亲Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam44岁。她于1444年与Sir William Adams Sr在英国威尔斯蒙姆爾武斯可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1460年在英国威尔斯布洛可爾享年33岁。

nameMeanings.name: Herbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German, English, and French: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements heri, hari ‘army’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. In Britain, this Old French name, introduced by the Normans, reinforced the less common Old English cognate Herebeorht. The surname was taken to Ireland after the Anglo-Norman invasion and in the 16th century.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): from the German personal name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Harbison
meanings: Scottish (Glasgow): patronymic from the Older Scots and Middle English personal name Herbert (the change from -er- to -ar- was a common one in Old French and Middle English). An intrusive n later gave Harbinson .

variants.name: Hebard
meanings: English (Surrey):
variant of Herbert , with assimilation of the first r. Compare Hebb .
variant of   Hibbert  .

variants.name: Harbert
meanings: German and English: variant of   Herbert  .

variants.name: Herbers
meanings: German and Dutch: patronymic from   Herbert  . It is found mainly in Lower Saxony and across the Dutch border.

variants.name: Dickherber
meanings: Probably a nickname for a fat person by the name of Herbert , of which Herber is a short form, or, more likely, in the north from Die(c)kherber, a topographic and distinguishing name for a Herber living by the dike, see Dicke 2. Compare Dickmeyer .

variants.name: Hebert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Andre, Emile, Normand, Jacques, Marcel, Pierre, Lucien, Michel, Gaston, Alcide, Camille.
French (Hébert): assimilated form of Herbert . Compare Abair , Abar , Abare , Abear , Aber , Eber , and Ebert .
German: variant of   Heber   1.

variants.name: Herber
meanings: German and Dutch: variant of   Herbert  .

variants.name: Herbertson
meanings: Scottish (Glasgow): patronymic from the Older Scots and Middle English personal name   Herbert  .

variants.name: Hebb
meanings: English (East Yorkshire and northeast Midlands): from the Middle English personal name Hebb, Ebb, pet forms of Herbert .

variants.name: Herb
meanings: South German: nickname for a harsh or rough person, from Middle High German herb ‘tart, harsh’.
German: from the personal name Herpo, a pet form of Herbert .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

variants.name: Alys
meanings: Variant spelling of   Alice .

variants.name: Alis
meanings: equivalent of Alice .

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Herbert was born in 1428, in Usk, Monmouthshire, Wales, her father, Sir William ap Thomas Herbert KG, was 27 and her mother, Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam, was 44. She married Sir William Adams Sr in 1444, in Usk, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died about 1460, in Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 33.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Herbert est née en 1428, à Usk, Monmouthshire, Galles, son père, Sir William ap Thomas Herbert KG, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam, avait 44 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Adams Sr en 1444, à Usk, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1460, à Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 33 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Herbert 1428 in Usk, Monmouthshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William ap Thomas Herbert KG 27 und ihre Mutter Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam 44. Sie hat 1444 in Usk, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom Sir William Adams Sr geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1460 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Herbert è nata il nel 1428 nel Usk, Monmouthshire, Galles, sua padre, Sir William ap Thomas Herbert KG, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam, aveva 44 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Adams Sr nel 1444, nel Usk, Monmouthshire, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1460, nel Pembrokeshire, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 33 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Herbertが1428年にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアウスクで生まれた時，父Sir William ap Thomas Herbert KGは27歳，母Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gamは44歳であった。1444年にイギリスウェールズモンモウスシュアイアウスクでSir William Adams Srと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1460年にイギリスウェールズペンブロケシュアイアで33歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Herbert(이)가 1428년 웨일스 몬모우스실르 스크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William ap Thomas Herbert KG(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam(은)는 44세였다. 그녀는 1444년 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르 스크에서 Sir William Adams Sr(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1460년 영국 웨일스 p브로케실르에서 33세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Sir William Adams Sr em 1444, em Usk, Monmouthshire, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Herbert родилась в 1428 г. в местности уск, монмоутшир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Sir William ap Thomas Herbert KG было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam, 44. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Adams Sr в 1444 г. в местности уск, монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла около 1460 г. в местности пемброкешир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 33 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Herbert nació en 1428, en Usk, Monmouthshire, Gales, su papá, Sir William ap Thomas Herbert KG, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam, tenía 44 años. Se casó con Sir William Adams Sr en 1444, en Usk, Monmouthshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1460, en Pembrokeshire, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 33 años.
